fundamentals.name: Astera Labs, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Astera Labs, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells semiconductor-based connectivity solutions for cloud and AI infrastructure. It offers an intelligent connectivity platform, comprised of semiconductor-based, high-speed, mixed-signal connectivity products that integrate a matrix of microcontrollers and sensors, and COSMOS. The company provides COSMOS software suite, a connectivity system management and optimization software that enables management and optimization of resources for large fleets at cloud-scale via link, fleet, and RAS management capabilities. In addition, it offers PCIe/CXL smart DSP retimers and cable modules; ethernet smart cable modules for cloud and AI infrastructure; CXL memory connectivity controllers; and smart fabric switches. The company serves hyperscalers and system original equipment manufacturers. Astera Labs, Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in San Jose, California.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with high margins and strong analyst support, albeit at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates by 13.5%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 93.4% YoY and earnings growth 144.4% YoY indicate strong top and bottom-line expansion.
Gross margin of 76.0% and profit margin of 26.7% demonstrate excellent profitability.
Return on equity at 21.1% and return on assets at 10.1% show efficient use of capital.
Strong analyst consensus with 22 buy ratings and a mean target price suggesting upside potential.
High current ratio of 11.30 and quick ratio of 10.55 indicate excellent short-term liquidity.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 221.31 and forward P/E of 77.34 indicate a very high valuation.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 55.68 is exceptionally high, suggesting the stock is priced for significant future growth.
Debt/Equity ratio of 2.80 is relatively high, though offset by strong cash and current ratios.
Beta of 3.36 suggests higher volatility compared to the broader market.
Analyst mean target price of $244.97 is below the current spot price, indicating some analysts may be bearish.

news.paragraph: Astera Labs has seen significant positive momentum, with shares climbing over 30% recently following analyst upgrades and positive coverage. The company's strong revenue and earnings growth, particularly in its latest quarter, have fueled this rally. While the stock is trading at a high valuation, the consistent analyst buy ratings and positive sentiment suggest underlying strength in its AI infrastructure business.
